---
title: "Caixin Global"
page-layout: article
---

# Caixin Global

## Description

English-language news source covering Chinese business, finance, economics, politics, and public policy. Useful for research on China's economy, markets, and regulatory environment.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Energy & Environment, Business & Economics, Government & Public Policy
- **Data/resource type:** Financial & Market Data, News & Current Events
- **Access model:** Individual Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Financial & Market Data, News & Current Events

## Access notes

Requires users to register for an individual account with a Yale email address for access.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://web.library.yale.edu/access-caixin-global)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
